name: Ferplast Cotton Tug Eight SH PA6530
description: Shaped like a figure eight, it offers an ergonomic and playful design that’s easy for dogs to grip and carry. At the center, a sturdy plastic joint adds extra durability and makes the toy comfortable for both pets and owners to hold during games. Its multicolored twisted cord provides a bright, eye-catching look that keeps dogs engaged and excited. This natural fabric toy is a great alternative to rubber or latex, giving your dog a safe and satisfying playtime experience. Key Features: • Made of twisted cotton – gentle on teeth yet strong for long-lasting play • Figure-eight design – fun and ergonomic for gripping and carrying • Central plastic joint – enhances durability and handling comfort • Vibrant multicolored cord – visually stimulating for dogs • Great for tug-of-war, chewing, and interactive play • Helps keep dogs active and mentally stimulated
